id.description: Globally unique identifier for this register.

description.description: A description of the purpose and scope of this register.

lastUpdated.description: The date this register was last updated.

id.description: Globally unique identifier of the registrar.

registrar.description: The organisation responsible for maintaining this register.

entries.description: The list of identifier schemes in this register.

description: A register of identifier schemes — a directory of identification systems used to uniquely identify entities such as organisations, products, facilities, and locations.

id.description: Globally unique identifier for this identifier scheme, expressed as a URI.

description.description: Description of the identifier scheme and its purpose.

registerType.description: The type of entity identified by this scheme.

registrarName.description: Official name of the organisation that operates this identifier scheme.

registrarId.description: Globally unique identifier of the registrar organisation.

legalBasis.description: A persistent link to the legislation, decree, or governance framework establishing the scheme's authority.

registeredIdPattern.description: A regular expression pattern that valid identifiers in this scheme must match.

registeredIdExample.description: An example of a valid identifier in this scheme.

registeredIdUriTemplate.description: A URI template used to construct a globally unique identifier from a registered ID, using {id} as placeholder.

queryEndpoint.description: A URI template for a human-readable query interface, using {id} as placeholder.

resolverEndpoint.description: A URI template for an identity resolver endpoint conforming to ISO/IEC 18975, using {id} as placeholder.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the jurisdiction of this scheme, or 'GLO' for global schemes.

documentation.description: A web page providing full documentation of this identifier scheme.

IdentifierSchemeEntry.description: A directory entry for an identifier scheme.
